query: WITH t1 AS (UPDATE http_trigger SET script_path = $1 WHERE script_path = $2 AND workspace_id = $3 AND is_flow = $4), t2 AS (UPDATE email_trigger SET script_path = $1 WHERE script_path = $2 AND workspace_id = $3 AND is_flow = $4) UPDATE native_trigger SET script_path = $1 WHERE script_path = $2 AND workspace_id = $3 AND is_flow = $4
